message:
feat(toon): add TOON output parser + normalization utilities (bd-2n73.8)

New flywheel-clients/toon module with format detection (JSON/JSONL/TOON/
SARIF/CSV/text), TOON section parser, unified output normalizer with
envelope unwrapping, and Zod schema validation. 33 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
